message:
fix: Pin pydantic==2.11.5 to match compiled pydantic-core 2.33.2

Latest pydantic requires pydantic-core 2.41.5 but we compile 2.33.2.
Pin to 2.11.5 which requires exactly 2.33.2. Also update kepler-port
test to expect pydantic available (metadata fix works now) and add
numpy operation test to diagnose real-world test failures.

files.patch:
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ jobs:
             typing-extensions jsonpatch jsonpointer distro tblib httpcore \
             tenacity requests httpx urllib3 \
             xxhash regex msgpack \
-            pydantic fastapi langchain-core langsmith langgraph \
+            pydantic==2.11.5 fastapi langchain-core langsmith langgraph \
             instructor openai dspy \
             orjson httptools
